body.title: Inference competition eval harness and race runner
body.result: eval_harness.py: run_race() scores both classifiers on holdout, returns accuracy + cloud_calls scorecard; 8 tests pass; deterministic
body.intention: I intend that the eval harness produces a reproducible scorecard that tells us which classifier wins the first race and at what cost.
body.description:
Build the race track: run both classifiers on the holdout set, score each on accuracy (agreement with book_learner labels) and cost (cloud_calls_count). Output a scorecard. This is the first run of the inference compilation competition.

**Affected files:** New `lab/competition/eval_harness.py`; imports both classifiers
**Design rules:** Holdout rows only; log per-row verdict; never modify holdout labels
**Scope boundary:** Score both classifiers on holdout; output scorecard. No winner promotion or model update in this ticket.
**Completion criteria:** Running `python lab/competition/eval_harness.py` prints scorecard with accuracy% and total_cloud_calls for each classifier; scorecard is deterministic (same holdout, same result).
